headlines.description: Kevin De Bruyne helped Manchester City stage a superb comeback from 2-0 down as he scored one and helped create two goals in an emphatic 5-2 win over Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: De Bruyne stars as City roar back to thrash Palace

events.name: Leicester City at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Leicester City twice came from behind to grab a 2-2 draw at Brighton on Saturday and end a run of eight Premier League losses without scoring.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leicester snap goalless run in draw with Brighton

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest's Champions League qualification hopes were hit by a 1-0 defeat against Everton after Abdoulaye Doucoure scored a 94th-minute winner at the City Ground on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton dent Forest's UCL hopes with late winner

headlines.description: Aston Villa took time to break down home resistance before earning a 3-0 win at relegated Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa inflict latest defeat on sorry Southampton

headlines.description: Arsenal had to settle for a 1-1 draw at home to Brentford after Yoane Wissa's fine finish to leave Liverpool within three wins of the title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal forced to settle for draw with Brentford
